posts.author: sundayfunday (Sharena Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
From the board menu, add “Board URL Link”

This will enable us to send the specific board via IM or email to a team member. We have users that do not use Monday daily. Having a link that we can quickly generate to share would be nice. Right now I have to open the Monday app in a browser to get the url. I would like to stay in the desktop app and just have a quick menu selection to create and copy the boards url link.
